title: Cute Korean Webtoon Couple Selfie Edit AI
sourceTitle: Cute Korean Webtoon Couple Selfie Edit AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image cute Korean webtoon outdoor selfie transformation for two adults from the uploaded couple photo, preserving the uploaded couple identity while turning the scene into a wholesome romantic illustration. Subject: hearts, flowers, stars, swirls, and sunshine icons supplies the swappable doodle elements detail for this template. two adults from the uploaded couple photo appear as a happy couple with warm smiles, round expressive eyes, rosy cheeks, and playful couple energy; identity cues from the upload stay recognizable in a soft webtoon form. Scene: lush green park on a bright sunny day provides bright sunny outdoor atmosphere with lush greenery or beach scenery, cozy lifestyle warmth, and dreamy cheerful space behind the couple. Composition: Close couple selfie composition with taking a close outdoor selfie with heads gently leaned together; both faces remain visible and affectionate, with natural phone-selfie framing and enough background to show the sunny outdoor scene. Signature Elements: Visible clothing, accessories, grooming, and styling: casual pastel outfits, simple phone case, and small hair accessories. Preserved cute korean webtoon couple selfie edit source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Hand-painted Korean webtoon illustration with clean line art, soft painterly shading, adorable proportions, whimsical children’s-book charm, kawaii aesthetic, gentle textures, and Instagram-worthy storybook finish. Color Palette: Soft pastel colors, warm skin blush, fresh greens or beach blues, creamy highlights, and vibrant but gentle romantic accents. Lighting: Bright sunny-day light diffused into soft webtoon highlights, gentle cheek glow, and cheerful outdoor warmth without harsh shadows. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
